title: Stronger Foundations
subtitle: Growth becomes more stable
description: By week 10, most major organs have formed and are beginning to function. Your baby continues to grow steadily, and the risk of early complications gradually starts to decrease.
what_to_expect: Major organs are formed and starting to function
Fingers and toes are more defined
Symptoms like nausea and fatigue may still be present but can begin to stabilize
care_tips: Maintain a balanced diet rich in essential nutrients
Stay hydrated and continue regular meal patterns
Get adequate rest and avoid unnecessary stress

medical_checkups.note: This stage often involves routine monitoring and early screening discussions.

commonly_suggested.name: Routine Blood Tests
commonly_suggested.purpose: Monitors overall health and detects deficiencies

medical_checkups.guidance: Your doctor may begin discussing upcoming screening tests based on your medical history.

important_note: With major organs formed, your baby is now entering a phase of growth and refinement.
reassurance: Your pregnancy is progressing steadily, and each week brings more development.
medical_disclaimer: Always follow your healthcare provider’s advice for tests and care during this stage.

diabetes.personalized_description: Maintaining stable blood sugar levels supports continued growth and organ function.
diabetes.medical_focus: Blood sugar may be monitored closely during routine prenatal care.

anemia.personalized_description: Adequate iron levels support increased blood volume and fetal growth.
anemia.medical_focus: Hemoglobin levels may be checked during routine tests.
anemia.reassurance: Proper nutrition helps maintain your energy and supports growth.

hypertension.personalized_description: Stable blood pressure supports proper circulation as growth continues.
hypertension.medical_focus: Blood pressure monitoring remains important during checkups.
hypertension.reassurance: A calm and consistent routine supports your well-being.

thyroid.personalized_description: Balanced thyroid levels support ongoing development and metabolism.
thyroid.medical_focus: Thyroid function may be monitored during ongoing evaluations.
thyroid.reassurance: Consistency helps maintain a healthy balance.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: As your pregnancy stabilizes, managing multiple conditions requires consistent and careful attention.
priority_tips: Maintain a balanced and regular lifestyle
Avoid sudden dietary or lifestyle changes
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Steady care and awareness can support a healthy journey forward.
